creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #1)
> Not sure if it's worth keeping the elaborative way of figuring out LIBSUFX
> compared to just updating it manually.
Because machines should do what they do better than humans.  Also, this makes the diff cleaner between updates.  Meanwhile, let's not spawn more Abseil update PRs, shall we?  Just amend already existing one.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 275887 ***
